---
title: "intro"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{intro}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(ncaa.analytics.royer)
```

## Basic analytics of NCAA teams:

### Top 10 by win percentage

You can rank the top 10 winingest teams of this year season by doing:

```{r}
best_10_winpct(df_cbb)
```

### Top offense:

Explore the best offenses based on the metric of your choice:
```{r}
top_offense(df_cbb,n=10,metric="ADJOE")
```

### Top defense:

Same logic here:
```{r}
top_defense(df_cbb,n=5,metric="ADJDE")
```


## Graphs
Discover the profile of your favorite team, how did the State Champions Michigan perform during this season?:
```{r}
team_profil(df_cbb,"Michigan")
```


## Conference filter:
You can filter the data by conference as well:
```{r}
filter_conference(df_cbb,conf="B12")
```
